hero.title: Digital Services Compliance
hero.description: At adinfinity, we are committed to complying with the European Digital Services Act (DSA) to ensure a safe, transparent, and responsible online environment for all our users.

content_moderation.title: Content Moderation Policy
content_moderation.description: We are committed to maintaining a safe and appropriate online environment. Our content moderation policy applies to all user-generated content on our website.

prohibited_content.title: Prohibited Content
items: Illegal content according to Greek or European legislation
Violent, graphic, or sexually explicit content
Content that violates intellectual property rights
Content that violates privacy or data protection laws

moderation_process.title: Moderation Process
items: Regular manual review of user content
Content removal within 24 hours for illegal content

user_reporting.title: User Reporting Mechanisms
user_reporting.description: We provide multiple channels for users to report potentially illegal or inappropriate content:

online_form.title: Online Report Form
online_form.description: Report content directly through our website

email_report.title: Email Report
email_report.description: Send detailed reports to our compliance team

phone_report.title: Phone Report
phone_report.description: Call us during business hours for urgent matters

transparency_reports.title: Transparency Reports
transparency_reports.description: We publish regular transparency reports to provide information about our content moderation activities and DSA compliance efforts.

annual_report.title: Annual Transparency Report
annual_report.description: Comprehensive annual report covering all DSA compliance measures

contact.title: DSA Compliance Contact
contact.description: For DSA compliance matters, content reports, or regulatory inquiries:

cta.title: Need to Report Content?
cta.description: We take all reports seriously and respond promptly to ensure a safe online environment.
